response.justification: Bogdan Szabo's resume shows extensive experience in software development, particularly in web, mobile, and embedded systems, but lacks direct experience in hardware optimization, SoC/IP modeling, or AI accelerator architecture. His background in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling is relevant but not aligned with the core requirements of performance modeling, deep-learning workload optimization, or hardware-software co-design for AI accelerators. The educational path does not meet the required qualifications for this principal-level role.
strengths: Strong software development and system architecture experience across multiple domains
Proven ability to optimize pricing strategies and AI-agent infrastructure using TypeScript and AWS
Experience with performance-critical applications and low-latency systems using Dlang and asynchronous I/O
concerns: No demonstrated experience in SoC/IP modeling or AI accelerator hardware optimization
Lacks deep neural network training/inference optimization or GPU architecture experience
Educational background does not meet required qualifications (Bachelor's degree with insufficient years of experience for principal-level role)

key_factors.factor: Lack of AI accelerator and SoC/IP modeling experience
Insufficient educational qualifications for principal-level role
No deep-learning workload optimization or GPU architecture expertise
